scope: Mk.XII Integration tier Hard PASS composite — strict AND-aggregator across preflight cascade + G0/G1/G7 (4-backbone majority) + G8/G9 (global). G10 deferred (post-EEG).
hard_pass_rule: preflight.GREEN AND G0>=3/4 AND G1>=3/4 AND G7>=3/4 AND G8.pass=1 AND G9.pass=1

G0_AN11_b.probe: per-backbone g_gate.json gate=G0_AN11_b pass=true; majority rule >=3/4

G1_BTom.probe: per-backbone g_gate.json gate=G1_BTom pass=true; majority rule >=3/4

G7_composite.probe: per-backbone g_gate.json gate=G7_composite pass=true; majority rule >=3/4

deferred.G10_hexad_triangulation: post-EEG D+5..D+21 — requires EEG hardware arrival + P3 GCG family*band 4-backbone results
deferred.fallback: Mk.XI v10 4-backbone LoRA ensemble (graceful degradation, mk_xii_proposal_outline §7)

note: Strict AND aggregator. YELLOW tier reserved (currently disabled). Negative falsifier supported via MK_XII_PREFLIGHT_PATH=/dev/null or any single input override.
